title: Proclamation No. 2088, s. 2010
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 2088

PROPOSED PROCLAMATION CREATING AND DESIGNATING CERTAIN PARCELS OF LAND OF THE PRIVATE DOMAIN SITUATED AT BARANGAY HALANG, BIÑAN, LAGUNA AS AN INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY PARK PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995 as amended by Republic Act No. 8748 and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO , President of the Philippines, do hereby create and designate as an information technology park, subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916, as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, Resolution No. 00-411 dated 29 December 2000 and Resolution No. 96-292 dated 29 August 1996 as amended by Resolution Nos. 09-645 and 10-083 dated 21 December 2009 and 26 February 2010, respectively, of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, an area located at Barangay Halang, Biñan, Laguna with an aggregate area of ONE HUNDRED SEVENTEEN THOUSAND FIFTY FOUR (117,054) SQUARE METERS , more, or less, as defined by the following technical description:

“Lot 7, Pcs-04-025102

A parcel of Land (Lot 7 of the consolidation-subdivision plan, Pcs-04-025102, being a potion * of consolidation of Lots 1-6, Block 12; 1-6, Block 13-A, Pcs-04-003849, Pcn-04-00167, Lot 2255, 2256, 2259, 2290, 2291 and 2292, Biñan Estate; Lot 2258-B, Psd-04-009525; Lot 2251-C-2, Psd-04-029540; Lot 2260-B, Psd-04-019477; Lot 3191-A, Psd-04-009523; Lots 2257-A & B, Psd-04-002039 (OLT); Lot 1, Psd-04-041053; Lot 3191-B-2, Psd-04-014678; Lot 2288-B (LRC), Psd-24786, LRC Rec. No. 8374), situated in Barangay Halang, Municipality of Biñan, Province of Laguna, Island of Luzon.

Bounded on the SW., along lines 1 to 72 by Lot 9 (Road); on the NW., along line 72-73 by Lot 3 (Right of Way); both of the consolidation-subdivision plan; on the NE., along lines 73 to 80 by Lot 3104 Biñan Estate; along line 80-81 by Lot 3193-A, Psd-04-029529; on the E., along lines 81-1 by Lot 8 of the consolidation-subdivision plan.

Beginning at a point marked ‘1’ on plan, being S. 10 deg. 00 E., 813.28 m. from Mon. No. 6, Biñan Estate.

thence N. 57 deg. 11′ W., 56.03 m. to point 2; thence N. 64 deg. 30′ W., 13.73 m. to point 3; thence N. 63 deg. 58′ W., 35.01 m. to point 4; thence N. 65 deg. 37′ W., 21.72 m. to point 5; thence N. 67 deg. 11′ W., 38.03 m. to point 6; beginning; containing an area of ONE HUNDRED SEVENTEEN THOUSAND FIFTY FOUR (117,054) SQUARE METERS . All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground by PS cyl. conc. mons. 15 x 60 cm; bearings true; date of original survey January 1906-February 1907 and that of the consolidation-subdivision survey: January 20-21, 2009 and was approved on December 2, 2009.”

IN WITNESS THEREOF , I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed hereto.

Done in the City of Manila, this 17th day of June , in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Ten.

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

By the President: (Sgd.) LEANDRO R. MENDOZA Executive Secretary

Source : CDAsia
